## What and why

<!-- One or two sentences on the change and the problem it solves. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] New / tightened rule (with tests)
- [ ] False-positive reduction
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Change to a rule's default decision or the report/exit-code contract (opened an issue first)

## Checklist

- [ ] `scripts/verify` passes (ruff, mypy, pytest)
- [ ] Rule changes have tests for both a true positive and a true negative
- [ ] No real secrets in tests or fixtures (synthetic, obviously-fake values only)
- [ ] Updated the `Unreleased` section of `CHANGELOG.md` for any user-visible effect
- [ ] Conventional commit messages, no AI co-authorship trailers
